name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification
notes:
This building block detects suspicious registry modifications to the TaskCache key.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Syed Hasan (@syedhasan009)
SIGMA Title: Scheduled TaskCache Change by Uncommon Program
SIGMA Description: Monitor the creation of a new key under 'TaskCache' when a new scheduled task is registered by a process that is not svchost.exe, which is suspicious


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

when the event matches LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\%' AQL filter query

when the event matches ((LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\UpdateOrchestrator%' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\SoftwareProtectionPlatform\SvcRestartTask\Index%' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\Flighting\OneSettings\RefreshCache\Index%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%TiWorker.exe') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\svchost.exe' OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%ngen.exe' AND (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tasks\{B66B135D-DA06-4FC4-95F8-7458E1D10129}%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tasks\{B66B135D-DA06-4FC4-95F8-7458E1D10129}%' OR LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\.NET Framework\.NET Framework NGEN%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\.NET Framework\.NET Framework NGEN%')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Microsoft Office\root\Integration\Integrator.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\root\Integration\Integrator.exe') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe' OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\Dropbox\Update\DropboxUpdate.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Dropbox\Update\DropboxUpdate.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe' AND "Target Object" LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\Server Manager Performance Monitor\%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\Server Manager Performance Monitor\%') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'System') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

AND when the event matches LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\%' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ((LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\UpdateOrchestrator%' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\SoftwareProtectionPlatform\SvcRestartTask\Index%' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%Microsoft\Windows\Flighting\OneSettings\RefreshCache\Index%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%TiWorker.exe') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\svchost.exe' OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%ngen.exe' AND (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tasks\{B66B135D-DA06-4FC4-95F8-7458E1D10129}%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tasks\{B66B135D-DA06-4FC4-95F8-7458E1D10129}%' OR LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\.NET Framework\.NET Framework NGEN%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\.NET Framework\.NET Framework NGEN%')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Microsoft Office\root\Integration\Integrator.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\root\Integration\Integrator.exe') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe'  OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\Dropbox\Update\DropboxUpdate.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Dropbox\Update\DropboxUpdate.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe' AND "Target Object" LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\Server Manager Performance Monitor\%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\Server Manager Performance Monitor\%') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'System') AQL filter query
